name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Three column grid
description: Blog section with a three-column card grid for browsing multiple posts at once.

name: Featured + side list
description: Blog section with one featured article with a stacked side list of supporting posts.

name: Minimal List
description: Blog section with a text-first vertical list with minimal visual chrome.

name: Alternating layout
description: Blog section with alternating left-right article rows to break visual repetition.
